LLMConfig.Prompt:
Classify the following meeting transcript as either CEO or CPO based on the provided criteria. Return ONLY a JSON object with 'classification' (CEO or CPO) and 'confidence' (High | Medium | Low).

CEO Criteria:
- Commercial & Financial (Revenue, Sales, Marketing spend)
- Strategy & Growth (Partnerships, Market positioning)
- Organisation & Leadership (Hiring, ExCo decision making)
- Business Level Operations

CPO Criteria:
- Product Development & NPI (Roadmap, MVP definition)
- R&D Execution (Engineering progress, technical trade-offs)
- Product Design & Quality (UX, Content quality)
- Delivery & Coordination (Sprint planning, AI integration)
